title: Power of Money
author: Priya
content:
Money is most powerful resource for a life of worldliness , ecstasy and joy of fulfillment. Everything on earth has an associated cost, which is the money in liquidity. It runs and goes from 1 hand to another and speaks its worth in the object invested in it. It can buy anything from an inanimate object to a living human being and its value is a priceless dime which can only be earn with one's hardwork. It's transactional, goes from person to person, and decouples itself from all forms of human relations.

 
Our toppling relationship with Money 

- Our family, friends, relatives, and others with whom we meet and greet to get along bind us together and form a basis of our existence. These relationships laid the foundation of trust and respect, and we value them. But sometimes these relationships get sour with the power of money. Our unrequested love and huge respect, care for our loved ones, gets deeper with our interpersonal ties and age-old relationship and this bond of unsolicited love and undue care turns sweet-bitter with or without an economic survival of money.

Deep pockets with loads of money show one's affluence and wealth to harbour good ties, old/new bonds of friendship in a relationship, but also keep our close, endearing people farther from us. It blindsided us , keeps us loaded with wealth but hollow from within due to afflicted , broken hearts of our loved ones who were with us in standby in times of days when they were our only asset , not the pride of money with a mirror of fake reality . 

A man with less money still complete in itself with fewer but stronger bonds of pure and healthy relationships and don't live in a cloak room of money, to envelope them in a world of vivacious might of rolling money,in a showbiz of fake reality but in actuality of true people.

 What money can do

- It can buy a house but not a home, a bed but not sleep , degree but not true knowledge or even people for your fun, entertainment but not true friends to be with you in your bad time. Our ideals, knowledge, and wisdom r the things we acquired from our hard work and effort, and there is no authority of elite socialism or power of money to deprive us of our basic right to education or humanity. 

We say money is everything. No money, no food, but I feel it's not money, it's the people and their kindness towards others, which sympathize them when they see others living miserably in need of money. And their conscience, their instinct, provokes them to be a shining armour for others. But it's not just one's kind attitude that acts as an inducement for others seeking help, it's also greed and an egoistic and a self absorbed feeling for themselves to spend on things for their own good, that alluded to giving fiscal support to others in an indirect way. Money precedes every other form of human values, whether it be love, friendship, kindness, care, or pity for someone.


 Denomination of money

 A money has its many forms. When we r born money is given in 

* hospitals as charges  
* In religious occasions as offerings 
* in school as fees 
* in transport as fare 
* in offices as salary 
* In relief camps as donations 
* In divorce as alimony 
* To poor as alms 
* For extra pays and perk as bonus 
* Money won in a fair as lottery 
* In community welfare as pittance 
* In shopping as discount 
* In buisness as revenue or profit 
* Money in corruption as bribe 
* Money to mafia as ransom 
* Money given for a service as subscription 
* Money paid to a valet as tip 
* Money in mortgage as pawn 
* Money in an auction is bidding 
* Money given in a brokerage as commission

 Ever imagined how we will trade for goods if no money is involved?


 Life without money 

- The value of goods and services is quantified by the amount of money we pay in exchange of that. As human beings, our basic necessity is food, clothes, and shelter, but we need many other resources for our survival and existence to live our lives freely. And we synthesized, creating a polished, plush, gilded life for us by utilising enough of these resources, but can we actually perceive a life full of princely, luxurious things without money?

There was a time when u can buy goods in exchange of goods called barter system but it can't be practiced today to buy every resource of your wishlist and barter it with your usable items. Having some physical or digital money is the only plausible source for all your desirable longings. U can buy anything of your wants, but not without money. It's the supreme wealth, and we all bow down to it. 

 The possession of wealth can turn all our wishful thinking into an aspirational reality , can transform shortcomings into assets ,flaws into virtues and weakness into strength. One can fulfill all their worldly desires and can be a life changer for those who r cash strapped, living poorly in an impoverished state and deprived of their basic needs of food, clothing, and shelter. Our money can bring a smile to someone's face , a 2 time happy meal for hungry , a healing remedy for infirm , and a back support for elderly. Therefore, be wise in your dealings. Your money is your strength, your only key to your health, wealth, prosperity, a silver icon for family, a hope for poors, and our service to our nation for its growth and economic productivity.
